title: schoenoplectus lacustris subsp. glaucus
intro: Schoenoplectus lacustris subsp. glaucus, also known as Grey Club-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the cattail family (Typhaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus lacustris subsp. glaucus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
